Word Definitions

All words that have appeared in NYT Spelling Bee.

ANTIS COMET COMPLETE ⭐ COMPOTE DETRAIN ⭐ DRAIN IRATE MOLE NADIR POEM RAID RAIN RANT READ REIN RETAIN RETINA RIDE RIND SAINT SATIN STAIN STRAIN STRAINER ⭐ TANS TEMPO TERRAINS ⭐ TIRADE TRADE TRAIN TRAINED ⭐ TREND TRIAD
